item.name: Bulk Journal Import
item.description: APIs for bulk importing journal vouchers via CSV.

request.description:
Import multiple journal entries from a CSV file. Each journal entry is grouped by posting_date.

CSV columns:
- ledger_name (required): Name of the ledger account
- debit (required): Debit amount (use 0 if credit)
- credit (required): Credit amount (use 0 if debit)
- posting_date (required): Date in Y-m-d format
- candidate_id (optional): Employee/candidate ID
- note (optional): Transaction note
Store a newly created resource in storage.

Invoices For p3

 invoices for p3.
Receive payment for a monthly invoice.

request.description:
Creates a receipt voucher linked to the invoice with a journal entry
and updates the invoice's paid_amount.

item.name: Issue a credit note for a monthly invoice.

request.description:
Full credit: reverses the entire invoice journal (swap debit/credit),
reverts installment status, and zeros out the invoice.

Partial credit: recalculates proportionally by days, reverses the difference,
and updates the invoice amount to the new prorated total.

query.description: Number of items per page. Default: 15.
Sort field (id, date, serial_no, amount, paid_amount, created_at). Default: created_at.
Search by serial number or note.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of monthly contract invoices with optional filtering.

item.name: Store a newly created monthly invoice.

request.description:
This method handles:
1. Validation of the installment.
2. Calculation of amounts:
   - VAT (assumed 5% inclusive): Total - (Total / 1.05)
   - Salary Cost: Full monthly salary of the maid
   - Profit: Total - VAT - Salary Cost
3. Ledger Resolution using `LedgerOfAccount` for:
   - Customer (Debit)
   - VAT Output (Credit)
   - Maid Salary (Credit)
   - P3 Profit (Credit)
4. Creation of `AmMonthlyContractInv` record.
5. Update of `AmInstallment` status to 1 (Invoiced).
6. Generation of Journal Entry via `JournalHeaderService` (Status: Draft).
Returns a single monthly contract invoice with all related data.
Updates the editable fields of a monthly contract invoice.

Deletes the invoice, reverts the installment status to pending,
and removes the associated journal entry.

item.name:
Maid Payroll

APIs for maid payroll salary calculations.

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of maids with their working days, salary,
last contract, and last customer for the given year and month.

Working days are calculated from contract movement (hire) dates and
return dates, clamped to the selected month boundaries.

Returns detailed contract movement records for a single employee
during the given year and month, including contract info, customer,
return date, and working days per movement.

item.name: Package One
item.description:
APIs for creating Package One journal entries (financial impact only).
Invoices are created separately via InvoiceController.

item.name: Create Received Voucher for Package One

request.description:
Create a receipt voucher for Package One, linked to an Invoice as source.
The customer's ledger account is used as the credit side, and the provided
debit_ledger_id is used as the debit side (e.g., Cash/Bank).

item.name: Create Credit Note for Package One

request.description:
Create a credit note that reverses the original journal entries for an invoice.
The original debit becomes credit and vice versa. The invoice will be marked as refunded.

item.name: Create Charging Entry for Package One

request.description:
Create a charging journal entry with custom lines (ledger_id with debit/credit amounts).
The invoice is referenced as the source.

Create journal entries for Package One (financial impact only).
The cn_number will be stored in all journal transaction lines.
Invoice creation is handled separately via InvoiceController.
Delete a Package One journal entry and its lines.

item.name: Receipt Vouchers
item.description: APIs for managing receipt vouchers with automatic journal entry creation.

request.description:
Store a newly created receipt voucher with automatic journal entry creation.
The journal entry will be created with a debit to the specified debit_ledger_id
and a credit to the credit_ledger_id for the specified amount.

variable.description: The ID of the receipt voucher.

request.description: Update the details of a specific receipt voucher and its associated journal entry.

variable.description: The ID of the receipt voucher to delete.

request.description: Remove a specific receipt voucher and its associated journal entry from the database.

item.name: Receive payment for a typing invoice

variable.description: The ID of the typing invoice.

request.description:
Create a receipt voucher for a specific typing invoice and record the payment
with proper journal entries. This endpoint creates a ReceiptVoucher linked to
the typing invoice via polymorphic relationship and updates the amount_received.
